strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Active engagement with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling at current role
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the depth expected for a Principal AI Strategy role
Career profile is senior IC, not director-level; lacks evidence of large-scale technical leadership or advisory work with strategic customers
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Lacks deep AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
No director-level leadership or strategic advisory track record
Strong polyglot engineering breadth and entrepreneurial founder experience

response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with founder experience and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption. The resume shows neither the depth of AI/ML work nor the scale of leadership and external influence the position requires.
